visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a medium close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey and white horizontal striped sweater. She is sitting in an indoor setting with a white chair and neutral background. She holds a white makeup sponge and speaks directly to the camera. (2) As she continues to speak, she begins dabbing her cheek with the makeup sponge. A static photo appears as a cutaway showing her with a man in an outdoor orchard; the man's face is obscured by a bear sticker. (3) She returns to the live shot, picking up an eyeshadow palette and a brush. She applies makeup to her eyelids while narrating. Various graphical stickers like '?!' and 'E' or 'I' appear around her head to emphasize her points. (4) Another cutaway photo shows her and the man indoors, both smiling, with his face again covered by a sticker. (5) In the final phase, she finishes her makeup and holds the palette toward the camera. Large text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with a call to action for viewers to leave comments.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國男朋友初遇(下). [Variety]: 沒看過第一集的人先去看! [Variety]: 大反轉即將公開. (2) [Subtitle]: 我先講. (3) [Subtitle]: 為什麼喜歡上他. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們越常見面越變熟. (5) [Variety]: 欸? 這個人. (6) [Subtitle]: 好像真的不錯. (7) [Subtitle]: 在我遇過的韓國男生裡. (8) [Subtitle]: 性格算是最好的. (9) [Subtitle]: 脾氣超級好. (10) [Subtitle]: 而且冬瓜是韓國男生. (11) [Subtitle]: 不抽菸. 不喝酒. (12) [Subtitle]: 我覺得. (13) [Subtitle]: 這個人的很多方面. (14) [Subtitle]: 值得學起來. (15) [Variety]: 大反轉就是. (16) [Variety]: 超愛一個人吃飯. (17) [Variety]: (ISFJ的靈魂=. (18) [Variety]: "很愛獨處". (19) [Subtitle]: 而且他原來. (20) [Variety]: 不是E. (21) [Subtitle]: 是超級內向的I人. (22) [Variety]: (無惡意的E人). (23) [Variety]: (一點都不可憐). (24) [Subtitle]: 其實非常享受一個人的時間. (25) [Subtitle]: 而且他平常. (26) [Subtitle]: 不太會主動約女生. (27) [Subtitle]: 但我們曖昧. (28) [Variety]: 大概1個月. (29) [Variety]: (機器人口氣). (30) [Subtitle]: 明天要不要見面. [Subtitle]: 一起吃個飯... (31) [Variety]: (就知道). (32) [Subtitle]: 他也喜歡我喔. (33) [Subtitle]: 想繼續聽嗎. (34) [Variety]: 沒想到那麼多人想聽. [Variety]: 韓國前男友(渣男)故事. [Variety]: 想聽的話，可以底下留言!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator as the main narrator, 1 male appearing in static photos with his face obscured.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a casual grey and white striped sweater. She has a friendly expression and uses natural-looking makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is a clean indoor room with soft white lighting and a modern white office chair. Occasional photo cutaways show a bright outdoor orchard with orange trees and a clear blue sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with clear, high-fidelity female narration in Mandarin. Her voice is bright and friendly, speaking at a moderately fast pace. A light, upbeat acoustic guitar track with a steady percussion beat plays in the background at a lower volume. (2) A subtle mechanical click is heard as the narrator taps a makeup sponge against her skin. The background music continues seamlessly with its warm, acoustic texture. (3) A synthesized, robotic-sounding voice with a low, monotone pitch speaks a short phrase in Korean, providing a stylistic break in the narration. The female narrator then resumes her natural, expressive tone. (4) The audio remains consistent through the final phase, featuring the narrator's clear voice and the ongoing acoustic background music. Occasional soft percussive sounds from the makeup application are audible, and the track concludes with a playful cartoon sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Introduction of Subject -> Positive Trait Analysis -> Reveal of Personality Type -> Specific Anecdote -> Engagement Hook
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal storytelling vlog where the creator shares her experience of meeting her Korean boyfriend. Using the 'Get Ready With Me' (GRWM) format, she engages the audience with a relatable activity while narrating her romantic history. She focuses on the contrast between her initial impressions and the reality of his introverted personality, ultimately building rapport with her viewers and teasing future content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is using makeup products as part of the storytelling format, but no specific brands are mentioned, shown with emphasis, or accompanied by promotional calls to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes standard social media editing tropes, such as text overlays and SFX, to maintain a high level of engagement during a narrative-driven personal story.
